title: microkentia eriostachys
intro: Microkentia eriostachys, also known as the fern palm or lady palm, is a species of palm tree native to Australia and New Caledonia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Microkentia eriostachys are said to include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
